description_long: This shotgun features a classic design with a wooden full stock and fore-end, paired with a metallic receiver and barrel. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a simple front sight and no visible ribbing or venting. The fore-end is ribbed for grip, indicating a pump-action mechanism, and the receiver is robust and rectangular. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionate, enclosing a single trigger. The overall finish is matte, with the wood showing a natural brown tone and the metal parts in a muted gray. The shotgun is utilitarian and sturdy, suitable for practical use in urban or rural environments.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a wooden full stock and fore-end, matte gray metal barrel, and a rounded trigger guard. The design is classic and utilitarian, with ribbed grip details and a long, smooth barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, long gray barrel, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, ribbed fore-end, and narrow profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the stock, fore-end, and barrel, with clear visibility of the pump grip.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and smooth with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
